info.name: GraphQL – Upload Module
info.description: Upload: initiateUpload, uploadStatus (query), presignedUrl (query), registerPart (mutation), completeUpload, abortUpload. Variables: use camelCase (uploadId, partNumber, fileSize, contentType). Flow: initiateUpload → presignedUrl per part → PUT part → registerPart → completeUpload. See sql/apis/10_UPLOAD_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query UploadStatus($uploadId: String!) { upload { uploadStatus(uploadId: $uploadId) { uploadId fileKey fileSize chunkSize uploadedParts totalParts uploadedBytes status } } }","variables":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}"}}

{"query":"query PresignedUrl($uploadId: String!, $partNumber: Int!) { upload { presignedUrl(uploadId: $uploadId, partNumber: $partNumber) { presignedUrl partNumber alreadyUploaded etag } } }","variables":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}","partNumber":1}

{"query":"mutation InitiateUpload($input: InitiateUploadInput!) { upload { initiateUpload(input: $input) { uploadId fileKey chunkSize numParts } } }","variables":{"input":{"filename":"contacts_2026.csv","fileSize":1048576,"contentType":"text/csv"}}

{"query":"mutation RegisterPart($input: RegisterPartInput!) { upload { registerPart(input: $input) { status partNumber } } }","variables":{"input":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}","partNumber":1,"etag":"\"abc123\""}}
{"query":"mutation CompleteUpload($input: CompleteUploadInput!) { upload { completeUpload(input: $input) { status fileKey s3Url location } } }","variables":{"input":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}"}}
{"query":"mutation AbortUpload($input: AbortUploadInput!) { upload { abortUpload(input: $input) { status uploadId } } }","variables":{"input":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}"}}
